name_en: 【Genuine Leather】 Hot Seller🔥 GG Marmont has been a hit in the fashion world since last season, and its popularity remains undiminished this year. The iconic double-G logo carries Gucci's literary and romantic story, perfectly interpreting vintage and luxury~
